pageContext.name: Venom
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Venom Life-Size Bust.   Queen Studios' 1:1 scale Venom brings to life the Lethal Protector of New York in this awe-inspiring limited edition collectible.   Carefully crafted from polystone and resin, the Queen Studios team has taken cues from Venom's symbiotic form to capture the character's unique elements. Rather than have the base separate from the bust, Venom's symbiotic form merges both together, representing how Venom bonds and merges with his host. The symbiote's eyes are bone white, his skin is jet black, and his renowned white corrupted spider insignia is pasted on his chest. The symbiote's teeth are on show and tentacle-like plasma is shooting from his torso creating a collectible that is out of this world!  Don't miss the chance to add the Venom Life-Size Bust or Carnage Life-Size bust to your Marvel collection!
